creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Smith from comment #4)
> I am a newbie, it may be something wrong with my system.
> What exactly do you want me to do?

I am happy this got resolved by reinstalling libGLU.

What I had in mind, and what may be useful should you run into something
similar in the future, is showing which files a certain package installs.

You can do this with

  % pkg info -l libGLU

for example.
